title: ALAND's Hypixel SkyBlock Enchanted Books
description: 📙 Gives Hypixel SkyBlock's enchanted books unique textures to make them more recognizable and fancy!
body:
This resource pack aims to give every enchanted book in Hypixel SkyBlock a unique texture to make them more recognizable and good-looking. ✨

Feel free to join the [Discord](https://discord.gg/J6E8PDdeZj) for sneak peeks and updates! 👀

**P.S. This pack requires Firmament to work.**

![7 Enchanted Books](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7581247345e12883db1e4c400ee88a517f618df3.png)

<details>
<summary>⭐ Credits & Inspiration</summary>

- [Faithless](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/faithless) by StitchSprites
- [Xali's Enchanted Books](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/xalis-enchanted-books) by xalixilax
- [TrentKanor's Texture Pack](https://hypixel.net/threads/trentkanors-texturepack-v7-3-wolves-and-endermans-update.4835312/) by TrentKanor
- [Sophie's Hypixel SkyBlock Enchantment Books](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/sophies-enchants) by Bentcheesee
</details>
